description: Solution Graph (thin). Joins the two upstream sides — g01's lecture_baseline@1 (the lecture skeleton + claim/concept join keys) and g02's user-approved research bundle — into the approved Solution deliverable (solution_blueprint@1): a lecture outline, the applied update plan (each mapped to a real slide), deferred items and source attribution. The boundary input is a thin composite (solution_graph_input@1) of those two refs; g03 is the first place both sides meet, so the finding<->slide mapping (slide_impact) is produced HERE, not in g02. SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the node sequence — g03_flow.py and the orchestrator prompt must agree with this manifest. Reviewers are runs of ONE physical agent (g03-a10-output-reviewer) with a per-node review_profile; the user solution gate is an orchestrator step. The producer uses the finalize-op write path; the thin exit bundle is a minimal valid solution_blueprint@1.
